Food, it appears, in the hands of people who are trying to make the world a better place, is never just food. It is hitched to everything else we care about: nourishment, health, skills, jobs, leadership, nature, community, economy, and, yes, even second chances, redemption, and empowerment.
Strive for sustainability.
